LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-01-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FEJOST, LLC'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION; MOTION TO STAY CASE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. FEJOST, LLC'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-01-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FEJOST, LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MICHAEL FELDBERG'S UNOPPOSED PRO HAC VICE APPLICATION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2023 Continued To Oct-11-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration; Motion To Stay Case
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GINA M. DIAZ, Esq. of Reichman Jorgensen Lehman & Feldberg LLP (Tel: 650-623-1416) for defendant Fejost LLC;
No appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FEJOST, LLC's Petition To Compel Arbitration; Motion To Stay Case.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Fejost, LLC's unopposed "motion to compel arbitration" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GINA M. DIAZ, Esq. of Reichman Jorgensen Lehman & Feldberg LLP (Tel: 650-623-1416) for defendant Fejost LLC;
No appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FEJOST, LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Michael Feldberg's unopposed pro hac vice application is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
